title: FrozenHomes
description: A lightweight Free Home GUI plugin!
body:
![In game appearance of GUI ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14d209e03631bdb59c271b631d52a4359da4310a_0.webp)**FrozenHomes – Home GUI Plugin**

FrozenHomes is a modern, lightweight Home GUI plugin inspired by DonutSMP.
It allows players to manage their homes through a clean GUI with smooth performance and simple permissions.
Perfect for SMP, Survival, and Donut-style servers running PaperMC.

**✨ Features**

📦 GUI-based Home System (no confusing commands)
🏠 2 Homes FREE by default for every player
👥 Team Home System
Every player gets 1 extra Team Home
Can be used for team bases, friends, or clans
🚀 Fast & optimized (no laggy tasks)
🔐 Permission-based home limits
🧠 Easy to understand for new players
💎 DonutSMP-inspired gameplay feel

**🔑 Permissions**

Permission
Description
frozenhomes.3
Allows player to set up to 3 homes
frozenhomes.4
Allows player to set up to 4 homes
frozenhomes.5
Allows player to set up to 5 homes
➡️ Note:
2 personal homes are free by default
Team Home is separate and does not count toward personal home limits
